title: User Management UI — Admin View
tech: Vite, React 18, TypeScript, React Router v6, Axios, CSS Modules
keyConstraints: TypeScript strict, no UI component library, plain CSS Modules only, Axios instance already configured with auth interceptor
description: Implement the Admin user management page. Admin can see all users, create new accounts, change roles, deactivate accounts and reset passwords. Accessible only to Admin role via RoleRoute. Add a link to this page in the navigation for Admin users only.
acceptanceCriteria: New route /users added to App.tsx — protected by RoleRoute for Admin only
UsersPage fetches GET /api/users on mount, displays table with: email, role badge, active/inactive status, actions
Create User button opens form with fields: email (required), password (required), role (DRIVER or DISPATCHER, required)
Create user form submits POST /api/users, adds user to list on success, shows error on failure including 409 if email taken
Each user row has Deactivate/Activate toggle that calls PATCH /api/users/:id with isActive
Admin's own account row does not show Deactivate button
Each user row has Reset Password button that opens a simple form with new password field, submits POST /api/users/:id/reset-password
Role badge color coded: ADMIN=purple, DISPATCHER=blue, DRIVER=green
Inactive users shown with dimmed/strikethrough style
Navigation shows Users link only when logged in user role is ADMIN
securityConsiderations: Never display or log password values in the UI. Reset password form must clear after submission. Admin cannot see their own deactivate button — check against AuthContext user.id. Role badge and active status are display only — changes go through the API, never manipulate local state without API confirmation.
